DOJO LIST

Karate Dojos & Classes in Ebetsu City, Ishikari City & Iwamizawa City

Inquiries: TEL 011-300-0048 (weekdays 1:00 PM–4:00 PM)

Dojo / Branch Address / Venue Training Days
1 # Seishinkan Oasa Dojo (Ebetsu Area Headquarters Dojo) 6-9 Oasa-sawacho, Ebetsu, Seishinkan, Park Hills 1F (along Niban-dori) Monday 16:00Thursday 18:30Friday 16:00Friday 18:45 (reservation required)Saturday 10:00
2 # Nopporo Karate Club 23-6 Nopporo-tondencho, Ebetsu, Morinodai Memorial Hall Wednesday 18:30
3 # Ebetsu Karate Club 3-jo 5-chome 11-1, Ebetsu, Ebetsu Central Community Center Friday 18:30
4 ● AEON Ebetsu Karate Club 34 Saiwaicho, Ebetsu, AEON Ebetsu 3F Sunday 10:00Sunday 13:00 (in preparation)
5 # Iwamizawa Karate Club 4-jo Nishi 1-chome, Iwamizawa, Iwamizawa Lifelong Learning Center Monday 18:30
6 # Ishikari Hanakawa Karate Club Hanakawa Minami 6-5, Ishikari, Hanakawa Minami Community Center Tuesday 16:30
7 # Ishikari Ryokuentai Karate Club Ryokuentai Higashi 2-jo 1-chome, Ishikari, Ryokuentai Green Hall Saturday 15:30
8 ★ Ishikari Hanakawa-Kita Karate Club ※ As of November 2022, merged with the Ryokuentai branch
  • ★Headquarters-run class — inquiries to the head office
  • ●Instructor-dispatch class — inquiries to the hosting cultural center / sports club
  • □Self-managed dojo — inquiries to the office or directly to the dojo manager

Related link:AEON Ebetsu Karate Club (Kids Karate Club)

Seishinkai

NPO All Japan Seishinkai Karate Federation

  • 2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo
  • TEL 011-300-0048（Mon–Fri 13:00–16:00）
  • FAX 011-300-0094
  • Karate@seishinkan.ne.jp
